seo.title: St. Pete Acting Coach | Gillian Arnold Atlas — On-Camera Acting Coaching
seo.description: On-camera acting coaching in St. Petersburg, Florida with Gillian Arnold Atlas — award-winning director, producer, and coach with 40+ years in television and film.

location.paragraph2: World-class training. Local heart. Industry connections that open doors. Real results for actors who are ready.

items.title: Personalized Coaching
items.text: Tailored guidance to unlock your unique strengths and truth.

items.title: Career Elevation

about.quote: My mission is simple: to help you discover your truth and share it with the world.
about.bio: I'm Gillian Arnold Atlas, an award-winning director, producer, and on-camera acting coach with more than 40 years of international experience in television and film. Having directed hundreds of episodes of acclaimed drama and unscripted television across Australia and Asia, I bring a director's eye to every performance. Known for helping actors deliver truthful, compelling work on camera, I combine real-world industry expertise with a supportive coaching style that prepares actors for auditions, television, film, and career growth.

items.name: Adam Pietriapaoli
items.quote: Gillian has an exceptional ability to tune into each individual actor and find the specific notes and directions to give each person to assist in finding a deeper, more connected level of work.

items.name: Meg MacRae
items.quote: Gillian has an exceptional ability to tune into each individual actor and find the specific notes and directions to give each person to assist in finding deeper, more connected levels of work. She is sharp and highly imaginative and helps her students expand their craft in all ways.

items.name: Chris Jablen
items.quote: I love how Gillian's class teaches us to be more adaptable to the moment-to-moment changes and helps us to understand what is required of us on set. I recommend this class to anyone of any skill level. You will walk away more confident and a much better actor than when you started.

items.title: Private Coaching
items.text: Preparing for an audition or rehearsing for film or TV? Gillian will arrange individual sessions in our studio or at your home.

items.title: Taking Direction Workshop
items.text: A 4-week intensive workshop designed to get you out of your comfort zone and into the moment — acting from a director's perspective.

items.title: Online Audition Feedback
items.text: Work with Gillian on perfecting your audition tape. Submit online and use video conferencing to refine it until it's ready to send to the casting agent.

contact.heading: Ready To Do The Work?
contact.text: Reach out to schedule a session, register for a workshop, or ask a question. Gillian personally responds to every inquiry.
